intel.tagline: The World's Most Sustainable Vodka Company
intel.description: Misadventure & Co. is a craft vodka distillery and tasting room that produces the world's first carbon-negative vodka made from surplus baked goods. They operate a cocktail bar in Vista, CA featuring live music, food, and craft cocktails made exclusively with their award-winning Misadventure Vodka. The brand combines sustainability with memorable experiences and fun.
intel.location: 2420 Grand Ave. Suite C, Vista, CA 92081
intel.social_proof: 18 awards won; World's first carbon negative consumer good; First and only spirit made from excess baked goods
intel.key_cta: ORDER ONLINE or VISIT OUR TASTING ROOM
intel.missing: No business hours listed, no email contact provided, no customer testimonials or reviews displayed, no Instagram/social media links visible, no online reservation system for tasting room, no newsletter signup confirmation, limited product photography
intel.brand_vibe: Fun, retro, sustainable, adventurous, approachable craft spirit
intel.pain_point: No clear business hours or reservation system makes it difficult for potential visitors to plan a tasting room visit.
intel.chat_persona: A friendly, enthusiastic brand ambassador who celebrates sustainability and fun adventures while helping customers learn about the vodka, book tasting room visits, and navigate event reservations.
intel.cta_angle: Visit the tasting room for a craft cocktail experience or reserve a private event

We call that a misadventure, and it’s what has led us here. Times are crazy, but they don’t have to be. Step back into a simpler time and find out what your next adventure has in store. email.subject_a: We built something for Misadventure & Co.
email.subject_b: Visitors can't book your tasting room online
email.subject_c: More cocktail bar reservations without the back-and-forth
email.body:
Turning surplus baked goods into carbon-negative vodka is one of the most clever sustainability plays I've seen in craft spirits — 18 awards clearly agree.

But right now, someone planning a night out in Vista has no way to reserve a spot at your tasting room or even check your hours without calling.

We built you a free preview — a redesigned homepage and a live AI chat agent that answers questions about your vodka, recommends cocktails, and books tasting room reservations 24/7.

See it here: https://joshclifford.github.io/lvrg-previews/misadventure/index.html

Claim it free by booking a 15-min call: https://theresandiego.com/advertise/

Josh | LVRG Agency | lvrg.com | 619.361.7484
